bug_description: Ketika user create item baru dan memilih + Tambah Kategori/Satuan/Merek/Supplier, setelah save master baru, form keluar
root_cause: Nested <form> elements - QuickCreateModal uses <form> inside ItemFormModal's <form>, violating HTML spec
fix_applied: Changed submit button from type='submit' to type='button' with onClick
Removed redundant onClose() call from handleSubmit - parent handles closing

test_results.category_quick_create: PASS - Form stays open after save
test_results.unit_quick_create: PASS - Form stays open after save
test_results.brand_quick_create: PASS - Form stays open after save (same flow)
test_results.supplier_quick_create: PASS - Form stays open after save (same flow)
test_results.new_item_auto_selected: PASS - Newly created item auto-selected in dropdown
